blocks.title: Welcome & readiness check
blocks.description: Top-of-day smoke test: environment, CLI auth, MCP servers reachable. Not a content module.

blocks.title: M1 — Copilot CLI extensibility architecture
blocks.description: Choose between AGENTS.md, custom agents, skills, prompts, hooks, and memory; wire them into one coherent project profile. Anchor labs: lab01/02/03/04/06/10.

blocks.title: M2 — MCP servers in anger
blocks.description: Compose multiple MCP servers in one session, debug silent failures, use --additional-mcp-config for per-session overrides. Anchor labs: lab05, lab12.

blocks.title: M3 — Multi-agent orchestration
blocks.description: Decompose tasks into parallel stateless sub-agent dispatches, route models by cost/judgment, know when not to spawn one. Anchor lab: lab07.

blocks.title: M4 — GitHub Agentic Workflows (gh-aw)
blocks.description: Read, author, and debug gh-aw workflows on the registry-pinned schema for PRD generation and code review. Anchor labs: lab08, lab09.

blocks.title: M5 — Enterprise plugin marketplace
blocks.description: Package agents/skills/prompts/hooks as a plugin, publish to an internal marketplace, reason about versioning and blast radius. Anchor lab: lab11.

blocks.title: M6 — A2A / ACP + tmux orchestrator meta-loop (flagship)
blocks.description: Stand up the tmux orchestrator (plan→implement→handoff→clear→qa) and run Copilot CLI as an ACP server. Anchor labs: lab13, lab14.

blocks.title: Q&A and wrap
blocks.description: Open Q&A, references, and pointers to follow-on labs and registry sources of truth.

blocks.title: Contingency / overflow
blocks.description: Absorbs run-long drift; not separately scheduled content. Visible so the agenda render shows the buffer.
